case_title: DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. ALCOR ELECTRIC, INC.

docket_entries.description: MPA ISO OF MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 473B (TRANSACTION ID # 62631613) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT
ORDER GRANTING DLSE'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERK'S JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473(B) (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCOR ELECTRIC, INC. $218,920.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $218,920.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT; VACATED PER ORDER FILED 12/7/18.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100031037)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 62631613) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-07-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473B IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

RULING: The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S Motion To Vacate Clerks Judgment Pursuant To CCP Section 473b is GRANTED.
